generated.title: GeneratedElectricSusceptibility
generated.description: This is an autogenerated partial class definition of 'ElectricSusceptibility'

description*.en: "Electric Susceptibility" is the ratio of electric polarization to electric field strength, normalized to the electric constant. The definition applies to an isotropic medium. For an anisotropic medium, electric susceptibility is a second order tensor.

title: ElectricSusceptibility
description: "Electric Susceptibility" is the ratio of electric polarization to electric field strength, normalized to the electric constant. The definition applies to an isotropic medium. For an anisotropic medium, electric susceptibility is a second order tensor.
